creator: handy@physics.montana.edu
text:
There's some stuff going on here.  The WindowMaker and Gnome folks finally
unified libPropList, so I took the liberty of upgrading libPropListGnome to 
the latest version here.  Just to keep it exciting, however, I'd like to 
see it get renamed libproplist -- so perhaps a repository copy first?  
(That would allow the gnome ports to slowly catch up with the current
version anyway.)

This may not make any sense whatsoever.  Anyway, what follows are two 
sets of diffs:

 (1) libproplist diffs against the libproplistgnome port, and 
 (2) wm diffs.

I should have visited with the maintainer of the libPropListgnome port,
but I have a long weekend planned and people give me no end of grief 
when a new windowmaker port comes out.  So, have fun.
